# gainCurveType

**Instance Property**

A rate of change for the setting’s volume.

## Declaration

```swift
var gainCurveType: PHASECurveType { get }
```

## Discussion

The framework sets the value to the [doc://com.apple.phase/documentation/PHASE/PHASEGroupPresetSetting/init(gain:rate:gainCurveType:rateCurveType:)] parameter.

## Setting Loudness

- **gain**: The volume of audio playback.
title: gainCurveType
